steps.t: Boradan has suggested that you look out north towards Edhellond from Amon Lontir.
You have taken in the sight of Edhellond at peace. You should talk to Boradan at Amon Lontir.
Boradan has suggested that you look out west towards Dol Amroth from Amon Lontir.
You have taken in the sight of Dol Amroth at peace. You should talk to Boradan at Amon Lontir.
